name: Grits Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown sausage and ground beef in a large skillet, stirring until it crumbles. Drain well.
2. Cook grits according to package directions. Spoon into a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish.
3. Combine pizza sauce, salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl.
4. Layer half of the pizza sauce mixture over the grits, followed by meat, green pepper, onion, and cheese.
5. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, omitting the last layer of cheese.
6. Cover and bake at 325 degrees for 25 minutes.
7. Add remaining cheese and bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
8 servings. This recipe was the first place winner in the 4-H division of the Annual Greater Grits Cook-off.
